data.title: INEOS TEAMSTERS IN OHIO LAUNCH STRIKE
data.description: In Ashtabula, Ohio, as of April 13, 2026, members of Teamsters Local 377 are demanding a fair contract and an end to unfair labor practices by the company INEOS. The workers have resorted to striking due to INEOS' lack of good faith in bargaining. The union has held discussions with INEOS in an attempt to reach a resolution.

data.title: LA VERNE CITY WORKERS JOIN TEAMSTERS
data.description: Over 50 workers in La Verne, California, made the decision to join Teamsters Local 1932 for robust representation. The workers sought improved workplace safeguards, equitable pay, and...

data.title: JiYu Skin Announces Expansion into Longevity Skincare, Positioning as a Leading Korean Skincare Brand in the U.S. Market
data.description: A popular K-Beauty brand, JiYu, originating in America, forecasts reaching $100 million in revenue by the year 2026. The brand, specializing in Korean skincare products created and produced in South Korea, recently unveiled its plans to venture into the growing market segment of longevity-oriented skincare. The move involves integrating cutting-edge technologies and techniques to cater to the increasing demand for skincare solutions that promote longevity and well-being.

data.title: SEC suggests some crypto interfaces exempt from broker registration. Hester Peirce criticizes broad securities law interpretations.
data.description: Hester Peirce, leader of the SEC's cryptocurrency task force, criticized the staff statement for its broad interpretation of securities laws concerning digital assets.

data.title: LGI Homes Introduces New Community in Greenville, SC
data.description: A new community, Waters Farm, is being introduced by LGI Homes in Woodruff, South Carolina. This development features a range of meticulously designed single-family homes for prospective buyers in the area.

data.title: A. O. Smith Reports Quarterly Dividend
data.description: Today, A. O. Smith Corporation (NYSE: AOS) directors announced a regular quarterly cash dividend of $.36 per share on the company's Common Stock and Class A Common Stock. The dividend will be paid on May 15 to shareholders of record.

data.title: Agillence and Toyota Motor Europe Enter Long-Term Contract for Inbound Logistics Optimization
data.description: Agillence, Inc., a leading provider of advanced supply chain optimization software based in Southfield, Michigan, has recently revealed a significant development on April 13, 2026. The company shared that they have secured a new long-term contract with Toyota Motor Europe N.V./S.A. (TME). This contract solidifies their partnership and entails Agillence continuing to offer their proprietary Agillence Lean Logistics solution to TME. The partnership signifies a strategic move for both companies, emphasizing the importance of efficient supply chain management in the automotive industry. This new agreement is poised to bring mutual benefits and drive operational excellence.

data.title: Broadridge introduces platform for Canada wealth managers to access crypto and tokenized assets, addressing challenges in integration.
data.description: The technology services company reported that wealth managers are struggling to incorporate digital assets into their operations without using separate systems.

data.title: Aurelia Metals Boosts Site Access Compliance to 96% with Automated Systems
data.description: In a recent partnership, Avetta® and Australian mining company Aurelia Metals collaborated to enhance compliance rates through automation. Within a year, Aurelia experienced significant improvements, including a 54% decrease in total reportable incident frequency rates (TRIFR). Additionally, their average compliance for mandatory site access modules rose from 32% to 96%, and their compliance with blood lead level monitoring increased to 91%. This successful initiative demonstrates the effectiveness of automation in boosting compliance within supply chains.

data.title: Gold Resource Corporation Announces Contract With SLR for Completion of the Back Forty Feasibility Study
data.description: In Denver, Gold Resource Corporation (NYSE American: GORO) disclosed its partnership with Responsible Mining Solutions Corp. from SLR Consulting Ltd. to conduct a detailed feasibility study for the Back Forty project in Michigan. The study will assess technical, economic, and operational aspects of the project. This initiative aims to provide a comprehensive analysis of the venture's viability and potential. Gold Resource Corporation is keen on leveraging this collaboration to enhance decision-making processes related to their wholly owned Back Forty project.

data.title: ArrowMark Financial Corp. Announces Monthly Cash Distribution of $0.15 per Share for April 2026
data.description: In a recent announcement, ArrowMark Financial Corp. (Nasdaq: BANX) declared a monthly cash distribution of $0.15 per share for April 2026. This applies to shareholders of record on April 23, 2026, with the total distribution amounting to $0.15 per share. The payout is scheduled for April 30, 2026. ArrowMark Financial Corp., an SEC registered closed-end management investment company, disclosed that its Board of Directors approved this distribution.

data.title: AIM ImmunoTech Provides Routine Update on Annual Filings
data.description: In Ocala, Florida, on April 13, 2026, AIM ImmunoTech Inc. (NYSE American: AIM) announced that its audited consolidated financial statements for the fiscal year ending on December 31, 2025, included an audit report from its independent registered public accounting firm emphasizing a going concern matter. This disclosure is mandated by Section 610(b) of the NYSE American Company Guide and does not signify any alterations to the Company's filings for the fiscal year ended on December 31, 2025.
